about.title: About Me
about.headline: Frontend Developer specializing in modern web interfaces
about.description: I build production-ready web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. With experience across the full development lifecycle, I deliver clean, maintainable code and pixel-perfect implementations. My background transitioning from military service has instilled strong discipline, problem-solving skills, and the ability to thrive in fast-paced environments.
